title: Agent Orange Directory; creation
doc_html:
§303.  Agent Orange Directory; creation

The Agent Orange Directory is hereby created within the Department of Veterans Affairs as more specifically provided in R.S. 29:304.

Acts 1985, No. 878, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1986; Acts 1995, No. 746, §1.
